title: Pronoun flow: le, lui, y, en
subtitle: Keep short sentences smooth with common pronouns.
duolingoBridge: Pronouns are a major step from understandable French to smoother French.
overview: Knowledge point 1: replace repeated nouns with common pronouns.
Knowledge point 2: practice one pronoun at a time in short sentences.

sections.title: Pronoun review chunks
rows: I am going to think about it

items.fr: Ce livre est utile; je le recommande souvent.
items.en: This book is useful; I often recommend it.
items.es: Este libro es útil; lo recomiendo a menudo.

items.fr: Mon professeur est disponible; je lui ai posé une question.
items.en: My teacher is available; I asked him a question.
items.es: Mi profesor está disponible; le hice una pregunta.

items.fr: La bibliothèque est calme; j’y vais quand je veux étudier.
items.en: The library is quiet; I go there when I want to study.
items.es: La biblioteca es tranquila; voy allí cuando quiero estudiar.

items.fr: J’ai besoin de plus d’exemples; j’en cherche chaque jour.
items.en: I need more examples; I look for some every day.
items.es: Necesito más ejemplos; busco algunos cada día.

items.fr: Cette règle est importante; je vais y penser pendant la pratique.
items.en: This rule is important; I am going to think about it during practice.
items.es: Esta regla es importante; voy a pensar en ella durante la práctica.
